scripts.start: "npm install --prefix ./client && npm install --prefix ./server && npm install && npm run next"
scripts.next: concurrently "npm run prisma:clear-migrations --prefix server" "rimraf dist --prefix server" "npm run start:dev --prefix server" "npm run prisma:generate --prefix server" "npm run prisma:migrate --prefix server" "npm run prisma:seed --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
scripts.next-start: concurrently "npm run start:dev --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
